mapper.select: SELECT cpc.id, cpc.product_name, cpc.cloth_paper_type_id, cpc.compatibility_status, cpc.paper_type, cpc.created_at, cpc.updated_at, cpc.notice_ids, cpt.type_name as cloth_paper_type_name, cpt.category as cloth_paper_category FROM cloth_paper_compatibility cpc LEFT JOIN cloth_paper_types cpt ON cpc.cloth_paper_type_id = cpt.id ORDER BY cpc.product_name, cpt.category, cpt.type_name

SELECT cpc.id, cpc.product_name, cpc.cloth_paper_type_id, cpc.compatibility_status, cpc.paper_type, cpc.created_at, cpc.updated_at, cpc.notice_ids, cpt.type_name as cloth_paper_type_name, cpt.category as cloth_paper_category FROM cloth_paper_compatibility cpc LEFT JOIN cloth_paper_types cpt ON cpc.cloth_paper_type_id = cpt.id WHERE cpc.product_name = #{projectId} ORDER BY cpt.category, cpt.type_name

SELECT cpc.id, cpc.product_name, cpc.cloth_paper_type_id, cpc.compatibility_status, cpc.paper_type, cpc.created_at, cpc.updated_at, cpc.notice_ids, cpt.type_name as cloth_paper_type_name, cpt.category as cloth_paper_category FROM cloth_paper_compatibility cpc LEFT JOIN cloth_paper_types cpt ON cpc.cloth_paper_type_id = cpt.id WHERE cpc.cloth_paper_type_id = #{clothPaperTypeId} ORDER BY cpc.product_name

SELECT cpc.id, cpc.product_name, cpc.cloth_paper_type_id, cpc.compatibility_status, cpc.paper_type, cpc.created_at, cpc.updated_at, cpc.notice_ids, cpt.type_name as cloth_paper_type_name, cpt.category as cloth_paper_category FROM cloth_paper_compatibility cpc LEFT JOIN cloth_paper_types cpt ON cpc.cloth_paper_type_id = cpt.id WHERE cpc.product_name = #{projectId} AND cpc.cloth_paper_type_id = #{clothPaperTypeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cloth_paper_compatibility ( product_name, cloth_paper_type_id, compatibility_status, paper_type, notice_ids, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productName}, #{clothPaperTypeId}, #{compatibilityStatus}, #{paperType}, #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE cloth_paper_compatibility SET product_name = #{productName}, compatibility_status = #{compatibilityStatus}, paper_type = #{paperType}, notice_ids = #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cloth_paper_compatibility WHERE product_name = #{projectId} AND cloth_paper_type_id = #{clothPaperTypeId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO cloth_paper_compatibility ( product_name, cloth_paper_type_id, compatibility_status, paper_type, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.productName}, #{item.clothPaperTypeId}, #{item.compatibilityStatus}, #{item.paperType}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT product_name FROM cloth_paper_compatibility ORDER BY product_name
SELECT DISTINCT product_name FROM cloth_paper_compatibility WHERE product_name = #{productName} LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT unnest(notice_ids) FROM cloth_paper_compatibility WHERE notice_ids IS NOT NULL AND array_length(notice_ids, 1) > 0 AND compatibility_status IN ('V', '▷')
AND cloth_paper_type_id = #{clothPaperTypeId}

SELECT cpc.id, cpc.product_name, cpc.cloth_paper_type_id, cpc.compatibility_status, cpc.paper_type, cpc.created_at, cpc.updated_at, cpc.notice_ids, cpt.type_name as cloth_paper_type_name, cpt.category as cloth_paper_category FROM cloth_paper_compatibility cpc LEFT JOIN cloth_paper_types cpt ON cpc.cloth_paper_type_id = cpt.id WHERE cpc.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE cloth_paper_compatibility SET notice_ids = #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
